---
title: "Publications"
---

[日本語へ戻る](../publications.qmd)

## Selected Publications

1. Your Name. "Article Title." *Journal or Conference*, Year.
2. Your Name and Coauthor. "Article Title." *Journal or Conference*, Year.
3. Your Name. "Article Title." *Journal or Conference*, Year.

## Working Papers

1. Your Name. "Working Paper Title." Manuscript in preparation.

## Other Outputs

- Dataset, software, or report title.
